en.body:
Soulbox Villa

A five-bedroom retreat sleeping twelve — designed for groups that want full privacy and full amenity in one place. Every bedroom has its own ensuite bathroom; the social heart of the property runs from the luxury kitchen to a covered tiki bar and a large pool, with an outdoor gym tucked into the grounds.

Bedrooms

  • Bedroom 1 — Two queen beds with ensuite bathroom
  • Bedroom 2 — King bed with ensuite bathroom
  • Bedroom 3 — King bed with ensuite bathroom
  • Bedroom 4 — King bed with ensuite bathroom
  • Bedroom 5 — King bed with ensuite bathroom (includes bathtub)

Property features

  • Luxury kitchen
  • Tiki bar
  • Large pool
  • Outdoor gym

Included services

  • Concierge
en.description: Soulbox Villa is a 5-bedroom luxury retreat north of Tulum, sleeping 12, with a private pool, outdoor gym, tiki bar, and concierge service.
en.name: Soulbox Villa

en.body:
Villa Seremonia

A nine-bedroom estate in north Tulum (Región 15) sleeping twenty-eight. Built for groups that want both shared experiences and private retreats — every bedroom has its own ensuite, while the main pool, indoor/outdoor kitchen, dining, and bar areas pull the property together. Hidden underneath: an underground speakeasy.

Bedrooms

  • Bedrooms 1–4 — One king bed, ensuite bathroom (×4)
  • Bedrooms 5–9 — Two queen beds, ensuite bathroom (×5)

Property features

  • Main outdoor pool
  • Three private plunge pools
  • Indoor/outdoor kitchen, dining, and social area
  • Lounge with 80″ smart TV
  • Bar area
  • Six queen daybeds
  • Underground speakeasy
  • Pizza oven
  • Yoga area
  • Complimentary access to the public gym next door

Included services

  • Private chef
  • Concierge
  • Daily housekeeping
  • Nighttime security
en.description: Villa Seremonia is a 9-bedroom estate in north Tulum sleeping 28, with a main pool plus three private plunge pools, an underground speakeasy, an outdoor pizza oven, a yoga area, and full chef + concierge service.
en.name: Villa Seremonia

en.body:
Casa Boko

A six-bedroom retreat in the heart of Aldea Zama, sleeping sixteen. Designed for groups that want to entertain — a stunning rooftop pool sits at the top of the property, with a dedicated event space and connected indoor/outdoor dining areas at ground level.

Bedrooms

  • Bedrooms 1–2 — King bed with bathtub, ensuite bathroom (×2)
  • Bedrooms 3–4 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×2)
  • Bedrooms 5–6 — Two queen beds, ensuite bathroom (×2)

Property features

  • Stunning rooftop pool
  • Dedicated event space
  • Indoor and outdoor dining areas

Included services

  • Daily housekeeping
  • Dedicated concierge
en.description: Casa Boko is a 6-bedroom Aldea Zama villa sleeping 16, with a stunning rooftop pool, a dedicated event space, and indoor/outdoor dining areas — full concierge and daily housekeeping included.
en.name: Casa Boko

en.body:
Casa Shalva

A six-bedroom retreat in Aldea Zama sleeping sixteen. Two pools — a spectacular rooftop pool and a second pool that opens directly off the living room. The interior reads as much like a small art gallery as a villa, with a sunken conversation pit grounding the social spaces.

Bedrooms

  • Bedroom 1 — Two king beds, ensuite bathroom
  • Bedroom 2 — Two queen beds, ensuite bathroom
  • Bedrooms 3–5 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×3)
  • Bedroom 6 — Single bunk beds

Property features

  • Spectacular rooftop pool
  • Large pool accessible from the living room
  • Art-gallery-style living room
  • Sunken conversation pit

Included services

  • Concierge
  • Housekeeping
en.description: Casa Shalva is a 6-bedroom villa in Aldea Zama sleeping 16, with a spectacular rooftop pool, a second pool off the living room, an art-gallery living space, and a sunken conversation pit.
en.name: Casa Shalva

en.body:
Casa Aviv

A four-bedroom villa in Aldea Zama sleeping eight, designed for a tight-knit group. Every bedroom carries a king bed and its own ensuite bathroom. The living room opens directly onto the property's large pool — the social spaces and the water feel like one continuous room.

Bedrooms

  • Bedrooms 1–4 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×4)

Property features

  • Large pool accessible from the living room

Included services

  • Concierge
  • Housekeeping
en.description: Casa Aviv is a 4-bedroom villa in Aldea Zama sleeping 8, with a large pool that opens directly off the living room. Concierge and housekeeping included.
en.name: Casa Aviv

en.body:
Casa Luna

A twelve-bedroom Tulum mansion sleeping forty — designed for large groups, wedding parties, and multi-family stays where everyone wants their own retreat. Two master suites with king beds and walk-in closets anchor the bedroom layout; ten additional bedrooms run the gamut from queen suites to four-person rooms with mixed bed configurations.

Bedrooms

  • Master 1–2 — King bed with walk-in closet (×2)
  • Bedroom 3 — Queen bed
  • Bedroom 4 — Queen bed with walk-in closet
  • Bedroom 5 — 2 double beds + 2 single beds + pull-out bed
  • Bedroom 6 — King bed
  • Bedrooms 7–9 — 2 double beds (×3)
  • Bedrooms 10–11 — 2 double beds (×2)
  • Bedroom 12 — 2 double beds

Property features

  • Stunning main pool
  • Huge main jacuzzi + 2 master-suite jacuzzis
  • Gym
  • Cold plunge
  • Steam room
  • Yoga room
  • Theater room with golf simulator (also doubles as a movie room)
  • Full private nightclub with DJ booth

Included services

  • Personal butler
  • Private chef
  • Dedicated concierge
  • Daily housekeeping
en.description: Casa Luna is a 12-bedroom Tulum mansion sleeping 40, with a stunning main pool, jacuzzis (main + master-suite), a wellness suite (gym, cold plunge, steam room, yoga room), a theater room with golf simulator, and a private nightclub with DJ booth. Personal butler, private chef, and dedicated concierge included.
en.name: Casa Luna
